{"id":"smallhold-4iru","title":"Scheduled posts","description":"## What
Allow clients to create posts with a future `scheduled_at` time. Scheduled posts are excluded from all feeds until published. The delivery worker polls and publishes them on time.

## Why
Users can draft posts in advance and have them go out at a chosen time — a standard feature expected by power users of social clients like Ivory.

## Phases covered
- DB schema extension (scheduled_at column)
- POST /api/v1/statuses with scheduled_at param and ScheduledStatus response
- GET/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/scheduled_statuses management endpoints
- Delivery worker extension to trigger publication on schedule","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T04:18:13Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T04:18:13Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-10qj","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:00Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-nnke","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:02Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-ry18","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:06Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
